query:
SELECT 
  'pesoFetal' as campo,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') != '""' AND JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') != '"0"' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_valor
FROM ultrassons WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoFetal') IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'pesoEstimado' as campo,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(*) as com_valor
FROM ultrassons WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.pesoEstimado') IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'percentilPeso' as campo,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(*) as com_valor
FROM ultrassons WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentilPeso') IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'percentil' as campo,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  COUNT(*) as com_valor
FROM ultrassons WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(dados, '$.percentil') IS NOT NULL;
